curation_notes: Patch modifies 2 non-test source files (plugin/etcd/etcd.go and plugin/etcd/setup.go). The vulnerability is in the TTL() function which casts kv.Lease (a 64-bit lease identifier) to uint32, producing incorrect TTL values. No sibling files share this pattern. Pre-assigned class integer-overflow (from CWE-681) is correct — the bug is an incorrect integer type conversion/truncation.
